final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing step-by-step tutorial illustration for deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step sequential layout with clear visual hierarchy (Step 1 / Step 2 / Step 3 / Step 4)
Subject: must include Docker container visualization, Hermes deployment process, and GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: needs a technical workspace context — exact environment details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a professional documentation direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include numbered steps "1", "2", "3", "4" with clear step labels
Constraints: must preserve 4 distinct steps in sequence, must show Docker container context, must show Hermes and GLMCodingPlan elements
Avoid:
